message:
refactor(mcp): replace wildcard imports with explicit imports in tests

Replace use super::* and use super::* test import patterns in
mcp_middleware.rs and mcp_resources.rs with explicit imports listing
only the types and functions each test module actually exercises.

- mcp_middleware tests: import McpOutputFormat, augment/encode/extract/
  parse functions, and FrameworkContent alias
- mcp_resources tests: import McpEnvelope, all 11 resource handler
  types, envelope_as_resource, tool_output_as_resource, Config,
  PaneFilterConfig, FrameworkContent, FrameworkResourceHandler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
